nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Podargiformes
nodes.summary: Podargiformes（Podargiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Solomons frogmouth、茶色蟆口鴟、Marbled frogmouth等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dulit frogmouth
nodes.summary: Dulit frogmouth（Dulit frogmouth，学名 Batrachostomus harterti），分类上属于Podargiformes，并归入蟆口鸱科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 蟆口鸱科
nodes.summary: 蟆口鸱科（Podargidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Solomons frogmouth、茶色蟆口鴟、Marbled frogmouth等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It has also been seen near Poring in the Kinabalu National Park in Sabah. Its preferred habitat is lower montane forest of both primary and secondary growth, at an elevation of 300 to 1500 m above sea level. At Mount Dulit it replaces the more widespread large frogmouth altitudinally, the latter being found at lower levels

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is restricted to the Bornean Mountains Endemic Bird Area and is threatened by habitat loss through logging and agricultural development

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is restricted to the Bornean Mountains Endemic Bird Area and is threatened by habitat loss through logging and agricultural development

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Dulit frogmouth 属于目 Podargiformes。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Dulit frogmouth 属于科 蟆口鸱科。
